name: Crab and Cheese Strata
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Swiss or gruyere or mixed with Parmesan, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim 6 slices of bread to fit the bottom of a greased 12x8 baking dish.
2. Butter one side of each slice with 1/2 tablespoon butter and place them in the bottom of the dish, buttered side up.
3. Mix together crabmeat, celery, onion, and mayonnaise. Spread over the bread slices.
4. Scatter cheese over the mixture.
5. Trim the other 6 slices of bread and butter them as above. Place with the buttered side down on top of the casserole.
6. In a bowl, mix together eggs, milk, mustard, and pepper. Pour evenly over the casserole.
7. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours (overnight).
8. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes or until puffed and lightly browned.
9. Let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving. Serves 6.
